researched_category.notes: Reducto is an AI-powered platform for parsing, extracting, splitting, editing, and classifying documents (PDFs, images, spreadsheets, etc.) via API, designed for AI agent workflows.

one_liner.value: Agentic document platform that parses, extracts, splits, edits, and classifies unstructured documents into structured JSON for AI agents and LLM pipelines.
one_liner.notes: From the docs overview: 'Reducto is the agentic document platform for AI teams who need production-grade document processing at enterprise scale.'

methods.notes: Primary auth is API key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. The MCP server also supports OAuth device-code flow for CLI login, but the programmatic agent/toolkit integration uses API key.

access.notes: Pricing page shows 'Free – Up to your first 15K credits'. Agent guide says 'Create a free account at studio.reducto.ai' and 'API keys authenticate your requests to Reducto.' No credit card or company email required for free tier. Enterprise/Growth plans require paid plan for advanced features (VPC, SSO, custom SLAs) but the API itself is accessible on free plan.

summary.value: Reducto has a fully documented public REST API at https://platform.reducto.ai with endpoints for Parse, Extract, Split, Edit, Classify, Upload, and async job management. SDKs in Python, Node.js, and Go. Also provides a CLI, MCP server, and webhooks. Supports 30+ file formats. API docs are comprehensive with quickstart, agent guide, and full reference.
summary.notes: API reference: docs.reducto.ai. Agent guide includes complete endpoint list. SDKs available on PyPI (reductoai), npm (reductoai), and Go module.

agent_interface.notes: Reducto has an official MCP server (mcp-server-reducto) hosted at https://mcp.reducto.ai/mcp and also runnable locally via uvx. It exposes tools for parse, extract, split, edit, classify, upload, and get_job. The docs explicitly state 'Agent-ready tooling: Reducto integrates directly into AI agent workflows via the MCP server, CLI, and native SDKs.' Also listed on Composio.

rationale.value: Reducto is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a self-serve free tier (15K free credits, no credit card required), a well-documented public REST API with API key auth (Bearer token), official SDKs (Python, Node.js, Go), an official MCP server, and a CLI. The documentation is agent-friendly with a dedicated 'API Reference for Coding Agents' page. The only minor friction is that Growth/Enterprise features require a paid plan, but the core API endpoints (Parse, Extract, Split, Edit, Classify) are all available on the free tier.

limitations: Could not find explicit documentation on rate limits for free tier, but the pricing page mentions 'Premium Rate Limits and Priority Requests' for Growth plan implying standard rate limits exist on free/standard tiers.
